SEARCH
Package controller

Class CollisionChecker

java.lang.Object
controller.CollisionChecker
public class CollisionChecker extends Object
Class to check the collisions between the various elements of the game
Author:
Scarselli Ilaria, matricola 1918975

    Method

    checkBomb()
    Method to check if the player is entering in contact with a bomb

    Method to check monster collision with the bombs

    Method to check the collisions between monsters

    Method to check if the player is colliding with a monster

    Method to check player collision with the objects, in particular with power-ups and with the exit

    Method to check if a monster is colliding with a player

  • Constructor Details

    • CollisionChecker

      public CollisionChecker()
      Class constructor

  • Method Details

    • checkTile

      public void checkTile(Character entity)
      Main method to check monsters and player collisions with the tiles of the map
      Parameters:
      entity - the character I want to check collisions for

    • checkObject

      public int checkObject(Character entity, boolean player)
      Method to check player collision with the objects, in particular with power-ups and with the exit
      Parameters:
      entity - the entity I want to check the collision of
      player - true if the entity is the player, false otherwise. Only the player can pick up power-ups and use exits
      Returns:
      the index of the object touched by the player

    • checkMonster

      public int checkMonster(Character entity, Monster[] target)
      Method to check if the player is colliding with a monster
      Parameters:
      entity - the player we're checking the collision of
      target - the monster's array
      Returns:
      the index of the monster the player is colliding with

    • checkEntity

      public int checkEntity(Character entity, Character[] target)
      Method to check the collisions between monsters
      Parameters:
      entity - a specific monster
      target - the array of monsters
      Returns:
      the index of the monster who's colliding with the one in input

    • checkPlayer

      public boolean checkPlayer(Character entity)
      Method to check if a monster is colliding with a player
      Parameters:
      entity - the monster I want to check the collision of
      Returns:
      a boolean value, true if the monster is entered in contact with the player, false otherwise

    • checkBomb

      public void checkBomb()
      Method to check if the player is entering in contact with a bomb

    • checkBomb

      public void checkBomb(Character entity)
      Method to check monster collision with the bombs
      Parameters:
      entity - the monster I want to check the collision of
